# John McDougal

> Sacramento-based IT consultant, homelabber, and chronic pattern-finder. johnmcdougal.com.

## About
- [About John McDougal](https://johnmcdougal.com/about/): Philosophy, credentials, career path, and what this site is for.

## Blog

### Series: How I built johnmcdougal.com
- [How I built johnmcdougal.com with Claude and Astro](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/how-i-built-johnmcdougal-com-with-claude-and-astro/): Part 1. Astro 5, Cloudflare Pages, agentic build process with Claude.
- [Custom email routing with Cloudflare and SMTP2Go](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/custom-email-routing-cloudflare-smtp2go/): Part 2. Receive via Cloudflare Email Routing, send via SMTP2Go, custom domain email at zero cost.
- [PostHog analytics on a static site (and fixing what the wizard broke)](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/posthog-analytics-astro-cloudflare-proxy/): Part 3. Self-hosted-style PostHog analytics proxied through Cloudflare to avoid blockers.
- [SPF, DKIM, and DMARC: the full lockdown after setting up custom email](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/email-authentication-spf-dkim-dmarc/): Part 4. Email authentication end to end -- SPF hard fail, DKIM via SMTP2Go CNAME, DMARC hardening sequence.
- [Do your parked domains need email authentication?](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/parked-domain-email-authentication/): Part 5. Four DNS records to prevent spoofing from domains that never send email.
- [How I read DMARC reports without reading DMARC reports](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/dmarc-reporting-postmark-digest/): Part 6. Postmark DMARC Digests -- free weekly digest that parses aggregate XML reports into readable pass/fail summaries.

### Series: Working with AI in 2026
- [The Latent Space: The mental model that changed how I work with AI](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/working-with-ai-the-latent-space/): Part 1. The latent space as a mental model -- why AI output is inconsistent, why prompts are navigation not instruction, and what changes when you understand the context window as a medium.
- [Context is the Interface](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/working-with-ai-context-is-the-interface/): Part 2. The context window as active environment -- how to prime sessions deliberately, recognize context drift and debt, and make the reset decision without treating it as failure.
- [Iteration as Method](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/working-with-ai-iteration-as-method/): Part 3. The first output isn't the answer -- it's material. Generate, evaluate, refine as a deliberate cycle; how to read gaps, tell refinement from iteration, and build durable artifacts.
- [The Prompt is a Draft](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/working-with-ai-the-prompt-is-a-draft/): Part 4. The model navigates from your prompt, it doesn't execute it. Separating context from ask, specifying output shape, and revising before sending changes what comes back.

### Other posts
- [Hello, World](https://johnmcdougal.com/blog/hello-world/): Introduction to the site.

## Raw Markdown
All blog posts are available as raw markdown at `/blog/[slug].md` alongside their HTML counterparts.

## Projects
- [This Site](https://johnmcdougal.com/projects/johnmcdougal-site/): Astro 5 blog and project journal. The site you are on -- documented publicly.
- [Homelab](https://johnmcdougal.com/projects/homelab/): Proxmox cluster, NAS devices, local AI inference servers (Phred + Frosty), PBS backups.
- [CUE-Verse](https://johnmcdougal.com/projects/cue-verse/): A framework for giving a homelab depth and linked memory -- knowledge, storage, compute, and context layers.
- [Aeon Desktop](https://johnmcdougal.com/projects/aeon-desktop/): An openSUSE MicroOS workstation experiment -- Distrobox, dotfiles, immutable Linux, and automated media ripping.
- [Userspace](https://johnmcdougal.com/projects/userspace/): A framework for maintaining ownership and interoperability across your personal digital life.
